title: The better AI gets, the smaller its share of the economy might get – Alex Imas and Phil Trammell
summary: Alex Imas and Phil Trammell discuss economic questions around AGI including optimal taxation and wealth redistribution, how developing countries should benefit from AI gains, and whether inequality necessarily explodes. The episode explores the counterintuitive finding that better AI may lead to a smaller economic share for AI itself due to competition driving down returns.
